trigger: Concurrent n8n retries (maxTries=3) or overlapping generate calls for same strategy_item_id after both pass empty pre-check
behavior: Both run full Creative Engine + Presentation; unique index allows only one package
paid_work_risk: High — duplicate Claude/OpenAI for one item
operator_impact: Silent cost spike; run looks normal
recommended_fix: Serialize generate-per-strategy-item (advisory lock or claim row before AI) or short-circuit if generation_lock held
regression_risk: Medium — must not block legitimate heal/retry

trigger: Completed sendVideoCallback throws after successful upload
behavior: Catch sends status=failed; durable MP4 may exist while job failed
data_risk: Medium — false failed vs orphan storage
operator_impact: Manual retry or abandoned good render
recommended_fix: On completed-callback failure: persist completed via admin API with artifact URLs or mark needs_reconcile without failed; do not send failed after successful upload

trigger: Render exceeds VIDEO_JOB_STALE_MINUTES (default 30) without DB updates (no heartbeat)
behavior: Second worker dispatched; duplicate paid render; first terminal callback wins
recommended_fix: Heartbeat updated_at during long phases OR increase stale threshold OR reclaim only if worker lease expired

trigger: Operator Stop after cancel check passed / generationBegan=true
behavior: In-flight Claude CE+Presentation continues to completion or fail; paid work after Stop
operator_impact: Stop does not stop current package AI
recommended_fix: Cooperative abort signal checked between CE phases; skip persist if run cancelled before insert

trigger: PDI validation fails after CE+Presentation
behavior: Immediate generation_failed; comment claims force inject but no repair wired; buildProductDemonstrationRepairDelta unused
paid_work_risk: High — full upstream paid work discarded
operator_impact: Failed slot; confusing after long wait
recommended_fix: Wire deterministic inject or repair delta before hard fail; or soft-fail to diagnostics

trigger: Heuristic fidelity or story violations after ≤1 repair
behavior: Package hard-fail; run item settled failed; CE+Presentation paid
recommended_fix: Narrow hard codes; soft-fail non-material; keep package on soft diagnostics

trigger: Copy contains listed corporate substring or forbidden claim substring
behavior: Regenerate up to 3 then fail package
recommended_fix: Move corporate to soft warn or narrower match; keep true forbidden claims

trigger: Run has packages but video_jobs stuck processing forever
behavior: No automatic run fail (stale only when packages.length===0)
operator_impact: UI stuck running; blocks? cancelled doesn't block new run but UX blocked on active run gate
recommended_fix: Add run-level stale for aged running items/jobs; surface stuck jobs

trigger: Double regenerate or regen while prior job processing
behavior: Always inserts new queued video_jobs; no assertNoActiveRender equivalent
data_risk: Medium — multiple jobs / last text wins
recommended_fix: Before insert: refuse if queued/processing job exists for primary item

trigger: Stop production run while language-variant jobs exist without production_run_id stamp
behavior: Variant/translation videos not failed by cancel filter
recommended_fix: Stamp production_run_id on variants OR cancel by package_id lineage

trigger: Late/duplicate package callback
behavior: Unconditional status/brief update — no terminal CAS
recommended_fix: Update only if status in allowed set (e.g. draft)

trigger: Crash between package/items/job inserts
behavior: Partial package; heal path or orphans; rollback also non-transactional
recommended_fix: Single RPC/transaction for persist

trigger: Crash after item failed before counters
behavior: Item terminal; run counters stale until reconcile
recommended_fix: RPC settle item+counters atomically

trigger: Two concurrent heals
behavior: Two video_jobs rows possible (no unique)
recommended_fix: Unique partial index or RPC insert-if-missing

trigger: Concurrent scene regenerates
behavior: TOCTOU past assertNoActiveRender; orphan images
recommended_fix: Lease/lock per package scene

trigger: Cancel between TTS start and next assert
behavior: TTS/image may complete after cancel notify
recommended_fix: More frequent asserts; abort fetch where supported

trigger: Any job status=failed
behavior: Package slot failed even if another job completed
operator_impact: One bad retry job fails slot
recommended_fix: Reconcile using latest non-cancelled job or designated primary job id

trigger: DNA mismatch after full gen
behavior: Continues; expensive inconsistency possible
recommended_fix: Promote critical DNA mismatches to repair or hard fail selectively

trigger: Failed packages persist no generation_telemetry
behavior: Cannot attribute failed-package spend precisely
recommended_fix: Persist telemetry on failure paths

trigger: No automated check for upload-success/callback-fail; no heartbeat reclaim race; no PDI repair wiring; no variant cancel coverage
behavior: Regressions undetected
recommended_fix: Add focused checks (not in this audit task)

trigger: Single package generation under worst nested caps
behavior: ≤~63 Claude completes + JSON repairs + video TTS×3 + images×10 before success
recommended_fix: Lower CE transport attempts; fail-fast cheaper gates before CE; cap total package budget

trigger: Double-click GENERATE before active run inserted
behavior: App check-then-insert only — Possible two runs
recommended_fix: DB unique partial active run or advisory lock
